name: Victoria Wood
bio: Victoria Wood was an English comedian, actress, singer and writer who began her career by winning the talent show New Faces in 1974. She became one of Britains most popular stand-up comics in the 1980s, interspersing her act with her own comic songs performed at the piano. She won multiple BAFTAs for her sketch and live work and wrote dozens of sketches, plays and sitcoms.

timeline.ev: Wins the talent show New Faces
Victoria Wood: As Seen on TV begins
Wins a BAFTA for As Seen on TV
An Audience with Victoria Wood wins a second BAFTA
Live show filmed at the Royal Albert Hall

accolades: BAFTA TV Award for Victoria Wood: As Seen on TV (1986)
BAFTA for An Audience with Victoria Wood (1988)
